articles.description: The cube-shaped console will cost £269 (€319) when it is released on 22 June in the UK and Ireland.
articles.content: Instead, David Lee, chief executive of US technology firm Nex, says its cube-shaped machine, the Nex Playground, is designed to get children moving.

articles.author: Nic Bunce
articles.title: Pokémon Go Frigibax Community Day - Eurogamer
articles.description: Frigibax is June 2026's Community Day Pokémon in Pokémon Go! Time to learn how to get a Shiny Hundo Frigibax with Perfect IV CP during the event.
articles.content: Frigibax is making an appearance during Pokémon Go's June Community Day. Finally, a good Pokémon! Not only will this give you the chance to catch a shiny Frigibax and a Frigibax with 100% perfect IV … [+6230 chars]
